notes: First run: bootstrapped guides/zelda-oot/ — new deck deck-action-adventure (6 slots) and library.json entry set to in-compilation, both per Pierre 2026-07-08.

All 7 sources were gathered by Pierre and verified present under zelda-oot/sources/ (local-only; sources/ is gitignored repo-wide, so only this manifest is committed — same convention as pokemon-crystal).
RetroAchievements and Zelda Dungeon sit behind a Cloudflare JS challenge, so snapshots are browser saves (scripts/snapshot-zelda-oot-sources.sh can refetch via the Wayback Machine if needed).
Scope: RA main set only — the Glitch Showcase subset (game 17444) is out of scope, per Pierre 2026-07-08.
No video source; route (src-ra-wiki, src-zd-walkthrough), ra-set, map, and manual dimensions are all covered.
